vocalStep.title: What kind of voice fits the melody?
vocalStep.subtitle: We'll use this voice style to shape the music

lyricsStep.title: Edit your lyrics

lyricsStep.subtitle: Not satisfied? Click regenerate

lyricsStep.basedOnSelection: Generating lyrics based on your choices:

createStep.title: Ready to create?

lyricsEditor.tipContent: You can edit the lyrics directly, or click "Regenerate" to let AI create a new version

createPreview.styleTip: Tip: You can enter style keywords like pop, rock, jazz, electronic, etc.
createPreview.insufficientCredits: Insufficient credits. Please top up or complete daily tasks to earn credits.

studio.welcomeSubtitle: Unlock the power of AI with our cutting-edge tools for voice, video, music, and art. Transform your ideas into reality—faster, smarter, and effortlessly.
studio.ttsDescription: Convert text to natural-sounding speech with advanced AI voices
studio.storyMakerDescription: Use AI tools to automatically generate story ideas, illustrations, audio and video
studio.tiktokDownloaderDesc: Download TikTok videos for free, no watermark, HD quality
studio.youtubeDownloaderDesc: Download YouTube videos for free, multiple formats and resolutions
